commit_scope: Add a Form-native ELF64/aarch64 executable-shape floor for Android arm64.

commands: bash scripts/agent-coord.sh claim form-native-elf-exec-floor "walk Android ELF executable floor: Form-native ELF64/aarch64 executable wrapper plus four-way shape proof and optional runner receipt"
local_validation.notes: Focused ELF executable proof returns 63 with fourth arm: 1 band(s) four-way and 1 ok, 0 divergent. Hati target catalog proof returns 16383 with fourth arm included. The metal-plane audit writes Form-emitted executable bytes to disk and file(1) reports an ELF 64-bit LSB executable, ARM aarch64, statically linked, no section header. The emitted executable is a _start program that writes FORM ELF to stdout and exits 42 when qemu-aarch64 or an Android runner is present; this host lacks qemu-aarch64, so the audit explicitly records runner=qemu-aarch64 unavailable and treats execution as the next physical receipt. Rebased full Form validation returns fourth arm: 158 band(s) four-way and 574 ok, 0 divergent.

ci_validation.notes: Pending push, PR, and GitHub checks.

deploy_validation.notes: No public deploy performed for this Form-native executable-shape slice.

phase_gate.reason: Local Form proof, executable inspection, and full validation passed; CI, review, merge, and deploy remain pending.

e2e_validation.expected_behavior_delta: Form now emits a target executable image for the Android arm64 metal plane: form-elf-exec writes an ELF64/aarch64 ET_EXEC image with one RX PT_LOAD segment and _start write+exit syscall bytes without clang as compiler, assembler, or linker. The target catalog exposes the Android form-native executable emitter while physical stdout/stderr/exit execution remains runner-gated until qemu-aarch64 or an Android device is present.
test_flows: Emit _start bytes that write FORM ELF and exit 42 through Linux/Android aarch64 syscalls.
Wrap those bytes with a Form-emitted ELF64 executable header and PT_LOAD program header.
Write the executable bytes to disk and verify file(1) reports an ARM aarch64 ELF executable.
Run the same executable under qemu-aarch64 or Android when available and expect stdout FORM ELF, empty stderr, and exit 42.
